raw_consumer_statement: Citibank Aadvantage Credit Card We had Fraud on out card from XXXX. After fraud was discovered, card was closed and new card issued. All fraud charges were transferred to new card, and are shown as " pending '' on old card. I have called 5 times and put all charges under review, and each time I call, we have to start the process over again. We still have {$2000.00} of fraud charged to our card, and our bill is dues XXXX I have asked to escalate situation, and am getting nowwhere.
